projectDescription: A classic two-player Tic Tac Toe game built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS that runs entirely in the browser.
keyFeatures: Two-player local gameplay with X and O markers
Automatic win detection for rows, columns, and diagonals
Draw detection when all cells are filled with no winner
Game state management preventing moves after game ends
Input validation preventing moves on occupied cells
Zero dependencies — runs in any modern browser
publicApiSurface: game(fila, columna) — processes a player move at the given row and column
revisarColumna() — checks all columns for a vertical win
revisarFila() — checks all rows for a horizontal win
revisarDiagonalDerecha() — checks the top-right to bottom-left diagonal
revisarDiagonalIzquierda() — checks the top-left to bottom-right diagonal
empate() — detects a draw when no cells remain empty
